content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM decision_table d
  WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
), haus_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
SELECT 
  b.*, 
  CASE 
    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
  END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  nm.TITLE AS net_TITLE,
  nm.FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,
  nm.SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,
  nm.STREET AS net_STREET,
  nm.STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,
  nm.POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,
  nm.CITY1 AS net_CITY1,
  nm.CITY2 AS net_CITY2,
  nm.EMAIL AS net_EMAIL,
  sm.TITLE AS sales_TITLE,
  sm.FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,
  sm.SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,
  sm.STREET AS sales_STREET,
  sm.STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,
  sm.POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,
  sm.CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,
  sm.CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,
  sm.EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 
    WHERE e1.EQUNR = b.EQUNR 
      AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024'
  ) AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 
    WHERE e2.EQUNR = b.EQUNR 
      AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023'
  ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING'
  ELSE CASE 
    WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN b.CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR b.CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
  END END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON b.HAUS = hc.HAUS
LEFT JOIN eablg ON b.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON b.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON b.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",  nm.TITLE AS net_TITLE,  nm.FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,  nm.SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,  nm.STREET AS net_STREET,  nm.STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,  nm.POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,  nm.CITY1 AS net_CITY1,  nm.CITY2 AS net_CITY2,  nm.EMAIL AS net_EMAIL,  sm.TITLE AS sales_TITLE,  sm.FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,  sm.SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,  sm.STREET AS sales_STREET,  sm.STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,  sm.POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,  sm.CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,  sm.CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,  sm.EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1_MASTER,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1_MASTER,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2_MASTER,  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL,  CASE WHEN EXISTS (    SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1     WHERE e1.EQUNR = b.EQUNR       AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'      AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024'  ) AND EXISTS (    SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2     WHERE e2.EQUNR = b.EQUNR       AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'      AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023'  ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING'  ELSE CASE      WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'    WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'    WHEN b.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'    WHEN b.CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR b.CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'    ELSE 'EVU'  END END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL FROM base b LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON b.HAUS = hc.HAUS LEFT JOIN eablg ON b.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON b.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON b.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mandatory_count FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_MASTER AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_MASTER AS CITY1, CITY2_MASTER AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_MASTER AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_MASTER AS CITY1, CITY2_MASTER AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG_FINAL <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

kwargs.content:
Process J09C completed.

- Exported 1230 `MANDATORY_READING` rows to `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
- Sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Exported 24016 non-`MANDATORY_READING` rows to `J09C.csv`
- Sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary table `J09C_temp`
